svg.title: DCS-SRS music streaming architecture
svg.desc: A client on the user's machine authenticates to a relay server co-located with DCS-SRS. The relay transcodes audio and speaks the SRS protocol to broadcast to in-game pilots.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What local audio file formats should the client support?')
sendPrompt('How would YouTube Music streaming work via ytmusicapi?')
sendPrompt('What are the licensing concerns with using the Spotify Web API here?')
sendPrompt('What does the client-side source and playlist manager need to do?')
sendPrompt('How should the client auth and token flow work?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the client-side audio encoding pipeline.')
sendPrompt('What does the auth and token service in the relay need to do?')
sendPrompt('How should rate limits and per-user quotas work?')
sendPrompt('What does the server-side audio pipeline look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the SRS adapter speak the SRS client protocol?')
sendPrompt('What should the admin UI, audit log, and kill switch provide?')
sendPrompt('How does the DCS-SRS server itself handle incoming transmissions?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a pilot tunes to the broadcast frequency?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a pilot tunes to the broadcast frequency?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a pilot tunes to the broadcast frequency?')
